177 E1100_BHVR_CHG_PRIOR_CD E1100_BHVR_CHG_PRIOR_CD E1100 Change in Behavior or Other Symptoms CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies how the resident's current behavior status compares to the prior assessment (e.g., stairs, outside of the facility). -=Not assessed/no information
